Class SMTSolverImplementation

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SMTSolverImplementation
All Implemented Interfaces:
SMTSolver, Runnable
public final class SMTSolverImplementation extends Object implements SMTSolver, Runnable
Represents a concrete instance of a running solver process on the KeY side. Amongst others performs the following steps:
  1. Translates the given problem to SMT format.
  2. Starts the external solver process.
  3. Sends the problem to the process.
  4. Communicates with the solver via the solver socket.

  • Constructor Details

    • SMTSolverImplementation

      public SMTSolverImplementation(SMTProblem problem, SolverListener listener, Services services, SolverType myType)
      Creates a new instance an SMT solver.
      Parameters:
      problem - the problem to send to the external solver process
      listener - the listener that has to be informed when the solver state changes
      services - the services needed to translate the problem to SMT format
      myType - the type of the solver to run (e.g., Z3, CVC3, Z3_CE)

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start(de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SolverTimeout timeout, SMTSettings settings)
      Starts a solver process. This method should be accessed only by an instance of SolverLauncher. If you want to start a solver please have a look at SolverLauncher.
      Specified by:
      start in interface SMTSolver
      Parameters:
      timeout - the timeout to use for the solver
      settings - the SMTSettings to use for this solver

    • getReasonOfInterruption

      public SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption getReasonOfInterruption()
      Specified by:
      getReasonOfInterruption in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the reason of the interruption: see ReasonOfInterruption.

    • getException

      public Throwable getException()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      If there has occurred an exception while executing the solver process, the method returns this exception, otherwise null
      Specified by:
      getException in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the exception that occured while executing the solver process, null if none occurred

    • getProblem

      public SMTProblem getProblem()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      Returns the SMT Problem that is connected to this solver process. If the solver process is still running the method returns null in order to maintain thread safety.
      Specified by:
      getProblem in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the SMT Problem that is connected to this solver process

    • setReasonOfInterruption

      public void setReasonOfInterruption(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reasonOfInterruption)

      public SolverType getType()
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the type of the solver process.

    • getStartTime

      public long getStartTime()
      Specified by:
      getStartTime in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the system time when the solver was started. (in ms)

    • getTimeout

      public long getTimeout()
      Specified by:
      getTimeout in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the amount of milliseconds after a timeout occurs. (in ms)

    • setTimeout

      public void setTimeout(long timeout)
      Specified by:
      setTimeout in interface SMTSolver

    • getState

      public SMTSolver.SolverState getState()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      Returns the current state of the solver. Possible values are
      Waiting: The solver process is waiting for the start signal
      Running: The solver process is running Stopped: The solver process was stopped. The reason can be a user interruption, an exception, a timeout or a successful run.
      Specified by:
      getState in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the current state of the solver process

    • wasInterrupted

      public boolean wasInterrupted()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      Returns true if the solver process was interrupted by a user, an exception or a timeout. In all other cases (including that the solver is still running) the method returns false.
      Specified by:
      wasInterrupted in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      true iff the solver process was interrupted by a user, an exception or a timeout

    • isRunning

      public boolean isRunning()
      Specified by:
      isRunning in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      true if the solver process is running, else false.

    • run

      public void run()
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable

    • name

      public String name()
      Specified by:
      name in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the name of the solver.

    • interrupt

      public void interrupt(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reason)
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      Use this method in order to interrupt a running solver process.
      Specified by:
      interrupt in interface SMTSolver
      Parameters:
      reason - The reason of interruption. Can only be set to ReasonOfInterruption.Timeout or ReasonOfInterruption.User other wise a IllegalArgumentException is thrown.

    • getFinalResult

      public SMTSolverResult getFinalResult()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      Returns the result of the execution. If the solver process is still running the method returns a result object that represents the result 'unknown'.
      Specified by:
      getFinalResult in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the result of the solver process' execution

    • getTacletTranslation

      public TacletSetTranslation getTacletTranslation()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      Returns the taclet translation that is used as assumptions. If the solver process is still running the method returns null in order to maintain thread safety.
      Specified by:
      getTacletTranslation in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the taclet translation that is used as assumptions

    • getTranslation

      public String getTranslation()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      Returns the translation of the SMTProblem that is handed over to the solver process. If the solver process is still running the method returns null in order to maintain thread safety.
      Specified by:
      getTranslation in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      String representation of the corresponding problem, if the solver process is not running, otherwise null.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • getRawSolverOutput

      public String getRawSolverOutput()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      Returns the raw solver output. This includes the result (sat/unsat/unknown), possibly error/warning messages, and possibly model/proof as certificate for sat/unsat.

      Note: Since "endmodel" and "success" are used only for steering the interaction between solver and KeY, these are currently filtered out!
      Specified by:
      getRawSolverOutput in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the raw output of the SMT solver

    • getRawSolverInput

      public String getRawSolverInput()
      Description copied from interface: SMTSolver
      Returns the raw solver input. This includes the preamble, the translation of the sequent, and the commands send to the solver to obtain the result(s).
      Specified by:
      getRawSolverInput in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the complete input that has been sent to the solver

    • getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation

      public Collection<Throwable> getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation()
      Specified by:
      getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the exceptions that have been thrown while translating taclets into assumptions.

      Specified by:
      getSocket in interface SMTSolver
      Returns:
      the solver socket used by the solver process at hand
